title: Repository overview page layout
summary: The repository page now uses the requested overview layout with a persistent right rail, a left README column, a timeline column, and compact tab navigation under the repository header.
userVisibleChange: Repository pages now match the provided layout more closely: the overview tab shows README and latest snapshot beside the evolution timeline, while repository overview, summary, contributors, and links stay in a right rail.

risks.title: Right rail density on narrow screens
risks.mitigation: Verified the layout at desktop and mobile viewports; the rail stacks below the tab content on small screens.

timeline.title: Moved repository cards into a persistent rail
timeline.summary: Repository overview, snapshot summary, contributor, and link cards now live in a page-level right rail instead of individual tab layouts.

timeline.title: Reworked overview content grid
timeline.summary: The overview tab now places README/latest snapshot in the primary column and the evolution timeline in a secondary column, with recent activity below.

timeline.title: Added editor action to repository links
timeline.summary: The repository links card now includes the same open-in-editor action used by the top bar.

timeline.title: Ran automated and browser checks
timeline.summary: Verified with UI build, Go tests, Playwright tab switching, and desktop/mobile screenshots.

decisions.title: Keep the right rail page-level
decisions.rationale: The reference layout keeps repository facts visible independent of the selected tab, so shared rail content belongs outside individual tab panels.

decisions.title: Stack rail content on mobile
decisions.rationale: Keeping all rail cards accessible below the primary content preserves functionality without forcing cramped columns on small screens.

validation.output: tsc --noEmit, vite build, and copy-dist completed successfully from ui/.
Verified overview layout, Snapshots tab switching, persistent right rail, and desktop/mobile screenshots.

artifacts.description: Desktop repository overview layout verification screenshot
Mobile repository overview layout verification screenshot
